ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "last_financing_size" REAL /* Last financing size in millions of dollars */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue in millions of dollars */,
  "year_founded" TEXT /* Year the company was founded */,
  "industry_focus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry focus of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company's core technology and services */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Current funding status */,
  "valuation" REAL /* Current valuation in millions of dollars */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the company record was last updated */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Array of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_focus_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_focus_id") REFERENCES industry_focus ("industry_focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_focus" (
  "industry_focus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry focus */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry focus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry focus */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Estimated market size in billions of dollars */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the industry */,
  "key_players" TEXT /* Array of key players in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financing_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financing round */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company receiving the financing */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of financing round (e.g., Series A, Series B) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the financing in millions of dollars */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the financing round */,
  "investor_ids" TEXT /* Array of investor IDs involved in the financing round */,
  "round_status" TEXT /* Status of the financing round */,
  "investment_return" REAL /* Expected return on investment (ROI) */,
  "valuation_post_round" REAL /* Company valuation after the financing round */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to the financing round documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_rounds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the investor */,
  "investor_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., venture capital, private equity) */,
  "investor_status" TEXT /* Status of the investor */,
  "investment_focus" TEXT /* Focus areas of the investor */,
  "total_invested" REAL /* Total amount invested by the investor in millions of dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company achieving the milestone */,
  "milestone_type" TEXT /* Type of milestone (e.g., product launch, partnership) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the milestone */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was achieved */,
  "milestone_status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the milestone on the company or industry */,
  "media_coverage" INTEGER /* Whether the milestone received media coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_milestones_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company forming the partnership */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the partner company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the partnership */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the partnership */,
  "partnership_status" TEXT /* Status of the partnership */,
  "partnership_value" REAL /* Value of the partnership in millions of dollars */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the partnership on the company or industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_partnerships_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_partnerships_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_expansions" (
  "expansion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expansion */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company expanding */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the expansion */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expansion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expansion */,
  "expansion_status" TEXT /* Status of the expansion */,
  "investment_required" REAL /* Investment required for the expansion in millions of dollars */,
  "expected_roi" REAL /* Expected return on investment for the expansion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expansion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_expansions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product or service */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company offering the product or service */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product or service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product or service */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the product or service was launched */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Key features of the product */,
  "market_response" TEXT /* Market response to the product */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated by the product in millions of dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_products_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company employing the employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee in thousands of dollars */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee works in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_employees_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company competing with the competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the competitor */,
  "competitor_status" TEXT /* Status of the competitor */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the competitor */,
  "key_products" TEXT /* Array of key products offered by the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_competitors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the award was received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "award_status" TEXT /* Status of the award */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the award on the company or industry */,
  "media_coverage" INTEGER /* Whether the award received media coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_awards_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the market trend */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend on the industry */,
  "trend_status" TEXT /* Status of the trend */,
  "growth_projections" TEXT /* Growth projections for the trend */,
  "key_drivers" TEXT /* Key drivers of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_trend_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-trend relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market trend */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the trend to the company */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trend's impact on the company */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Action plan to capitalize on the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_trend_relations_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES market_trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_trend_relations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
